translations.en: a handsome gentleman, immaculately dressed.
translations.zh: 一位英俊的紳士，衣著一絲不苟。

translations.en: "Can't talk now, $G." He pauses to punch another pirate in the belly.
translations.zh: 「現在沒空說話，$G。」他停頓了一下，朝另一名海盜肚子上打了一拳。

translations.en: "Come back later when I've less on my mind!"
translations.zh: 「待在下空些時再來！」

translations.en: "Hello, $G. Your company is welcome."
translations.zh: 「$G，你好，汝的到來令在下歡迎。」

translations.en: "I'm @Captain Fox, of the Silken @Stag."
translations.zh: 「在下是絲絨@Captain（船長）號的@Stag（福克）斯船長。」

translations.en: When you say 'Captain,' all the pirates at the table turn to you expectantly.
translations.zh: 汝說出「船長」二字，桌旁所有海盜都轉過頭來滿懷期待地看著汝。

translations.en: When they realize you weren't talking to them, they go back to what they were doing.
translations.zh: 當他們意識到汝並非在叫他們，便各自回去繼續做事了。

translations.en: "We just stopped off here for some supplies and a @drink or two."
translations.zh: 「我們只是路過此地補充給養，順便喝幾杯@drink（飲品）。」

translations.en: "Well, maybe three wouldn't hurt."
translations.zh: 「嗯，或許三杯也無妨。」

translations.en: "I sail the wide, wide sea, to the edges of the @world and back again."
translations.zh: 「在下航行茫茫大海，駛向@world（世界）邊緣再回返。」

translations.en: "Of course, I'm also known for the @paintings I create in my spare time."
translations.zh: 「當然，在下亦以閒暇時創作的@paintings（畫作）聞名。」

translations.en: "There are a few of them around here. Go see for yourself."
translations.zh: 「附近就有幾幅，汝自去看看吧。」

translations.en: "Captain John, that lunatic?"
translations.zh: 「約翰船長，那個瘋子？」

translations.en: "I hear he went @underground seeking the @gargoyles, but he fled from the first one he encountered."
translations.zh: 「在下聽說他深入@underground（地底）尋訪@gargoyles（魔像族），卻在遇見第一個後便落荒而逃。」

translations.en: "Nobody knows where he is now."
translations.zh: 「現在沒人知道他在哪裡。」

translations.en: "Well, that's not what I heard." says Leodon.
translations.zh: 「嗯，那不是在下聽說的版本。」李奧頓說。

translations.en: "Under the earth is no place for a seafaring man to be."
translations.zh: 「地底之下不是一個航海人該待的地方。」

translations.en: "Tough creatures. My crew and I steer well clear of them."
translations.zh: 「強悍的生物，在下和船員都對他們敬而遠之。」

translations.en: "Don't go too far, matey--ye'll fall off!" He laughs a hearty laugh and takes a swig of ale.
translations.zh: 「別走太遠，老兄——汝會掉下去的！」他哈哈大笑，喝了一口麥酒。
translations.note: 世界盡頭有邊緣，航海者迷信

translations.en: "Until we meet again."
translations.zh: 「後會有期。」

translations.en: "I can't help ye with that."
translations.zh: 「此事在下幫不上忙。」

translations.en: Your question makes him laugh suddenly. His ale spills across the table.
translations.zh: 汝的問題令他突然大笑，麥酒潑灑在桌上。

translations.en: He continues laughing as he pours himself another ale.
translations.zh: 他繼續大笑，同時為自己斟上另一杯麥酒。

translator_notes: 111 Captain Fox: 鴉爪鎮過路海盜船長，英俊豪爽，兼職畫家。知道Captain John入地洞尋魔像族後落荒而逃的故事。Leodon在旁插話。
